name: Three Cheese Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your pizza stone or oven tiles to 450 degrees.
2. Flatten the dough and form it into a ball by folding the left side two-thirds over onto the right side.
3. Flatten the dough, pushing from right to left. Turn a quarter turn and repeat this rapidly until you have a smooth cushion of dough on the bottom.
4. Turn the dough "smooth side up" and rotate it between your hands while tucking the dough under itself. This will increase the tension on the top of the dough and create a nice ball shape.
5. Flatten the dough into a disk using a floured rolling pin. If the dough is sticky, flour both sides heavily.
6. Sprinkle the pizza peel with cornmeal.
7. Roll the dough up on your rolling pin and transfer it to the peel.
8. Adjust the dough as needed and quickly assemble the pizza by brushing the surface lightly with olive oil.
9. Spread the tomato sauce evenly over the surface, leaving a 1/2 inch border.
10. Garnish the surface with the mixed cheeses, add the herbs, and drizzle the olive oil over the surface.
11. Add salt and pepper to taste and finish with a sprinkling of parmesan cheese.
12. Open the oven door, position the peel at the back of the stone or tiles, and give the pizza a few quick jerks to ensure it is loose and will slide onto the baking surface.
13. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes, until the cheese is bubbling and the edges are lightly browned.
